name: Set up Shopify
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": The Shopify integration is available upon application. Please "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "contact us"}]}, {"text": " if you would like to have this enabled on your account."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Before you Begin"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Shopify integration requires several steps be completed prior to set up:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Shipping rate names in Shopify must be unique. Neto matches your shipping rates by their name, so ensure that domestic and international rates are not named the same."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Making them unique gives you better control over which shipping option appears on orders."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add payment methods, such as "}, {"text": "AfterPay"}, {"text": ", "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/811-paypal-payment-method", "children": [{"text": "PayPal"}]}, {"text": ", and "}, {"text": "Apple Pay"}, {"text": " In Neto to match those in Shopify. They don't need to be functional, you can add them as "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/810-offline-payment-methods", "children": [{"text": "offline payment methods"}]}, {"text": " so that they can be mapped during setup."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Install the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/693-customer-groups", "children": [{"text": "customer groups add-on"}]}, {"text": " and set up a Shopify price group (optional)."}]}]}, {"type": "li", Once you have your file:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Import Data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Perform complex import", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and select "}, {"text": "Start Data Import Wizard", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the Pop-up menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the "}, {"text": "Upload File", "bold": true}, {"text": " page, click the "}, {"text": "Browse", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and locate the file to upload."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step button", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "SKU", "bold": true}, {"text": " field in Neto must be matched with the "}, {"text": "SKU", "bold": true}, {"text": " field in Shopify."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select 'SKU*' from the "}, {"text": "Database Field Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " field dropdown menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add Extra Field", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select 'Approved For Shopify' from the "}, {"text": "Database Field Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the "}, {"text": "Column name", "bold": true}, {"text": " dropdown to 'Static Value' and a blank field will display beneath."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ">"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter 'Y' in the blank field.
